top_signals.title: Japan Stocks Set to Climb as Yen Hits 40-Year Low: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Japanese stocks were set to rise as the yen slid to a four-decade low against the dollar and a rebound in several US technology giants lifted Wall Street.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Forgent, Backer Offer Stock After Price Doubles Since IPO
top_signals.summary: Forgent Power Solutions Inc. and its private equity backer Neos Partners LP are offering to sell about 35 million shares, marking the third stock sale since the power distribution equipment maker went public in February.
